headline: Keefe Bruyette Downgrades The Allstate Corporation (ALL) Stock to Market Perform
summary: The Allstate Corporation (NYSE:ALL) is one of the Best Bargain Stocks to Buy in June. On June 7, Keefe Bruyette downgraded the company’s stock to “Market Perform” from “Outperform” with a price objective of $242, down from the previous target of $266. As per the analyst, The Allstate Corporation (NYSE:ALL)’s previously accelerating YoY personal auto policies in force […]
